dashboard.title: Hiring overview
dashboard.description: Track hiring performance and open roles.
dashboard.emptyJobsDesc: Create a job to start attracting candidates.
dashboard.applicationRateHint: Compare pending review vs accepted applications to monitor funnel health.

jobs.noJobsDescription: Create your first job posting to attract candidates.
jobs.profileRequiredDesc: Complete your company profile before managing jobs.
jobs.errorDesc: We could not load your job list.
jobs.title: Job postings
jobs.description: Create, edit and manage your postings.
jobs.actionHint: Close or reopen jobs, edit details, or open the public page.
jobs.emptyDesc: Adjust filters or create a new posting.

jobForm.categoryPlaceholder: Internal category code from operations (e.g. DEV_FRONTEND)
jobForm.categoryHelp: Category ID is an internal code for reporting (e.g. DEV_FRONTEND, BA_MID). It does not have to match the candidate-facing title.
jobForm.categoryWarningSpaces: This value looks like a human-readable title (contains spaces) rather than an internal category code. Double-check with your taxonomy if you rely on category reports.
jobForm.categoryHelpWhenEmpty: If you do not have a code yet, you may leave this empty; the job can still be created, but category reporting may be less accurate.
jobForm.editModeRestrictedFields: Fields such as categoryId, budgetType and isRemote cannot be changed after the job is created. Create a new posting if you need to change them.
jobForm.validTitleMin: Title must be at least 5 characters
jobForm.validDescriptionMin: Description must be at least 20 characters
jobForm.profileRequiredDesc: Create your company profile before posting jobs.
jobForm.errorLoadDesc: The job may have been removed or you may not have access.
jobForm.pageDescription: Fill in the details; candidates see the title, location and description prominently.
jobForm.tip1: Use a clear title and location so candidates can find your posting in search.
jobForm.tip2: List must-have skills separately; they power filters and recommendations.
jobForm.tip3: Set a realistic deadline; active listings with deadlines convert better.

verification.validDocRequired: Provide at least one document link
verification.profileRequiredDesc: Create your profile before requesting verification.
verification.title: Company verification
verification.description: Submit documents so we can verify your business.
verification.reviewHint: We will review your submission and update the status here.
verification.formHint: Paste public URLs to PDF or image evidence (registration, tax ID, etc.).

applications.profileRequiredDesc: Complete your company profile to review applications.
applications.title: Applications
applications.selectJobFirst: Select a job to see applicants.
applications.emptyNoJobDesc: Select a job above to load its applicants.

applicationDetail.toastUnlockCVFirst: Unlock candidate contact before opening CV files.
applicationDetail.missingIdDesc: Check the link or open the application from the list.
applicationDetail.title: Application detail
applicationDetail.description: Review the candidate package and update status.
applicationDetail.noCVAvailable: The candidate has no CVs available.
applicationDetail.cvAccessNotReady: CV access is not ready yet. Try again later or check unlock level.

applicationNotes.title: Internal notes
applicationNotes.hint: Private to your team; not visible to the candidate.

candidateSearch.toastEnterDesc: Enter a description for semantic search
candidateSearch.profileRequiredDesc: Complete your profile before searching candidates.
candidateSearch.errorDesc: We could not run the search.
candidateSearch.title: Candidate search
candidateSearch.description: Find candidates by job, filters or AI-assisted search.
candidateSearch.descriptionPlaceholder: Paste the job description you want to match against
candidateSearch.notSearched: Run a search to see candidates.
candidateSearch.emptyDesc: Adjust filters or pick another job.
candidateSearch.emptyNoMatchDesc: Broaden filters or try another mode.

profile.validNameMin: Name must be at least 2 characters
profile.validLogoUrl: Logo must start with http:// or https://
profile.validWebsiteUrl: Website must start with http:// or https://
profile.title: Company profile
profile.description: Information shown to candidates on your jobs.
profile.formSubtitle: Logo, contact channels and company story.
profile.noBadge: Your company is not verified yet.
profile.descriptionPlaceholder: What you do, culture, tech stack…
profile.previewHint: Shown on job postings and public company page.

messages.title: Messages
messages.descriptionChat: Chat with the candidate during hiring.
messages.errorLoadDesc: Connection error. Try again or contact support.
messages.emptyNoConversationDesc: Open an application and choose “Message candidate” to start.
messages.loadError: Could not load messages. Check your connection and try again.
messages.composeHint: Enter to send · Shift+Enter for new line
